groupings.title: Planning and Validation
groupings.description: Route broad Three.js WebGPU requests and prove rendered results with reproducible evidence.

groupings.title: Cameras and Final Image
groupings.description: Control camera rigs, shadows, ambient contact shading, bloom, exposure, grading, and render-pipeline ownership.

groupings.title: Worlds and Environments
groupings.description: Build skies, atmosphere, clouds, oceans, bounded water, rain, snow, and wet-surface systems.

groupings.title: Procedural Content
groupings.description: Author procedural fields, materials, geometry, cities, planets, vegetation, and creatures.

groupings.title: Motion and Effects
groupings.description: Implement procedural motion, particles, trails, surface history, and curved-ray space effects.
